accurate.why: Accurately describes nullifying the BOEM marine archaeological resources rule (Sep 3, 2024) and the reinstated prior regime.

no_hallucinations.why: Detail (50-year threshold, Outer Continental Shelf) is accurate context.

states_purpose.why: States it rescinds the archaeological report requirement.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Explains the rule is nullified and prior regulations reinstated.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the reinstated condition (report only if regional director has reason to believe a resource is present).

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the operative effect and consequence.
